_note: 저작 소스(단일 진실). def/ko/ex는 사람이 쓰고, IPA·음절은 build.py가 CMUdict·pyphen에서 생성한다. 편집 후 `python3 tools/build-entries/build.py` → `npm run validate`.

apple.def: a round red or green fruit that grows on a tree
ex: I ate a red {{apple}} after lunch today.
나는 오늘 점심 먹고 빨간 사과를 먹었어요.
There are many {{apples}} on that tree.

ball.def: a round thing that you kick or catch when you play games
ex: The children kick the {{ball}} in the park.
He caught the {{ball}} with both hands.

bird.def: a small animal that can fly high in the sky
ex: A little {{bird}} is singing in the tree.
The {{bird}} flew high up into the sky.

book.def: a set of many pages with words and pictures that you read
ex: I read a fun {{book}} before I sleep.
나는 자기 전에 재미있는 책을 읽어요.
She has many {{books}} on her desk.

bread.def: a food that people bake and eat with butter or jam
ex: I eat {{bread}} with butter for breakfast.
나는 아침으로 버터를 바른 빵을 먹어요.
My mother makes fresh {{bread}} every week.
우리 엄마는 매주 갓 구운 빵을 만들어요.

cat.def: a small soft animal that people keep at home
ex: My {{cat}} likes to sleep on my bed.
우리 고양이는 내 침대에서 자는 걸 좋아해요.
The {{cat}} is playing with a small ball.
고양이가 작은 공을 가지고 놀고 있어요.

cold.def: not warm, like ice or snow in winter
ex: The water in the river is very {{cold}}.
I wear a warm coat on {{cold}} days.
나는 추운 날에는 따뜻한 외투를 입어요.

dog.def: an animal that many people keep at home and love
ex: Our {{dog}} runs very fast in the park.
우리 강아지는 공원에서 아주 빨리 달려요.
The {{dog}} wants to play with me now.
강아지가 지금 나랑 놀고 싶어 해요.

door.def: the part of a room that you open to go inside
ex: Please close the {{door}} when you leave.
The {{door}} is open, so come inside.

fish.def: an animal that lives in water and can swim
ex: Many {{fish}} live in this cold river.
이 차가운 강에는 물고기가 많이 살아요.
We saw a big {{fish}} in the water.

flower.def: the pretty part of a plant with a nice smell
ex: She gave me a pretty red {{flower}}.
그녀가 나에게 예쁜 빨간 꽃을 줬어요.

friend.def: someone that you know well and like very much
ex: My best {{friend}} lives next to me.
내 가장 친한 친구는 내 옆집에 살아요.
I play games with my {{friends}} after school.
나는 방과 후에 친구들이랑 게임을 해요.

hand.def: the part of your body at the end of your arm
ex: Please wash your {{hands}} before you eat.
She holds a pen in her right {{hand}}.

milk.note: 셀 수 없는 명사예요. 'a milk'가 아니라 'a glass of milk'라고 해요.
milk.def: the white drink that comes from a cow
ex: I drink a glass of {{milk}} every morning.
나는 매일 아침 우유 한 잔을 마셔요.
The baby drinks warm {{milk}} before bed.
아기는 자기 전에 따뜻한 우유를 마셔요.

rabbit.def: a small soft animal with long ears that can jump
ex: The white {{rabbit}} has very long ears.
A {{rabbit}} can jump high and run fast.
토끼는 높이 뛰고 빨리 달릴 수 있어요.

rain.def: water that falls from the sky in small drops
ex: The {{rain}} fell all day long today.
We can not play outside in the {{rain}}.
비가 와서 우리는 밖에서 놀 수 없어요.

school.def: a place where children go to learn
ex: I go to {{school}} with my friends.
Our {{school}} is close to my house.

star.def: a small bright light that you see in the night sky
ex: I can see a bright {{star}} tonight.
There are many {{stars}} in the night sky.

sun.def: the very bright star that gives us light in the day
ex: The {{sun}} is very bright this morning.
Plants need water and {{sun}} to grow.

tree.def: a tall plant with a hard brown body and many leaves
ex: A big {{tree}} grows behind our house.
우리 집 뒤에 큰 나무가 자라요.

window.def: the glass part of a wall that you open for air and light
ex: Please open the {{window}} to let in air.
I can see the moon through my {{window}}.
나는 창문으로 달을 볼 수 있어요.

tiger.def: a big wild animal like a large cat with black lines
ex: The {{tiger}} sleeps under a tree all day.
호랑이는 하루 종일 나무 밑에서 자요.
A {{tiger}} can run very fast to catch food.
호랑이는 먹이를 잡으려고 아주 빨리 달려요.

lion.def: a big wild animal that is called the king of animals
ex: The {{lion}} has a loud and strong voice.
We saw a {{lion}} sleeping at the zoo.
우리는 동물원에서 자고 있는 사자를 봤어요.

bear.def: a big heavy animal covered with thick brown hair
ex: A brown {{bear}} was fishing in the river.
갈색 곰이 강에서 물고기를 잡고 있었어요.
The {{bear}} sleeps all winter in a cave.

monkey.def: an animal that climbs trees and has a long tail
ex: A {{monkey}} can climb a tree very fast.
원숭이는 나무를 아주 빨리 올라갈 수 있어요.

duck.def: a bird that swims on water and has a wide mouth
ex: A {{duck}} is swimming on the lake.

cow.def: a big farm animal that gives us milk
ex: The {{cow}} is eating grass in the field.

pig.def: a fat pink farm animal with a short tail
ex: The {{pig}} is sleeping in the mud.
A baby {{pig}} is very small and pink.

horse.def: a large strong animal that people ride
ex: The {{horse}} runs fast across the field.
She likes to ride a brown {{horse}}.
그녀는 갈색 말을 타는 걸 좋아해요.

mouse.def: a very small animal with a long thin tail
ex: A small {{mouse}} ran under the bed.
The cat wants to catch the {{mouse}}.

egg.def: a round white thing that a bird makes its babies in
ex: The bird sits on its {{eggs}} all day.
새가 하루 종일 알 위에 앉아 있어요.

water.note: 셀 수 없는 명사예요. 'a glass of water'라고 해요.
water.def: the clear thing that falls as rain and that we drink
ex: Please give me a glass of {{water}}.
Fish live in the {{water}} of the river.

moon.def: the round white thing that you see in the night sky
ex: The {{moon}} was very bright last night.
We can see the {{moon}} from our window.
우리는 창문으로 달을 볼 수 있어요.

sky.def: the wide open space high above your head
ex: The {{sky}} is blue on a sunny day.
Many stars shine in the night {{sky}}.

snow.def: soft white drops that fall from the sky when it is cold
ex: The children play in the white {{snow}}.
We make a snowman when it {{snows}}.

cloud.def: a white or grey thing in the sky that brings rain
ex: That white {{cloud}} looks like a rabbit.

mountain.def: a very high place made of rock and ground
ex: We climbed a high {{mountain}} last week.

river.def: a long line of water that moves across the land

sea.def: the very big area of salt water on the earth
ex: Many kinds of fish live in the {{sea}}.

fire.def: the hot bright thing that burns and gives heat

head.def: the top part of your body where your face is
ex: I wear a hat on my {{head}}.
She turned her {{head}} to look at me.

face.def: the front part of your head with your eyes and mouth
ex: Please wash your {{face}} in the morning.
She had a big smile on her {{face}}.

eye.def: the part of your face that you use to see
ex: Close your {{eyes}} and go to sleep.
그 아기는 크고 갈색인 눈을 가졌어요.

ear.def: the part of your body that you hear with
ex: 토끼는 긴 귀가 두 개 있어요.
I heard the music with my {{ears}}.

nose.def: the part of your face that you use to smell
ex: An elephant has a very long {{nose}}.
I smell the flowers with my {{nose}}.

mouth.def: the part of your face that you use to eat and speak
ex: Do not talk with food in your {{mouth}}.

foot.def: the part of your body that you stand on
ex: She has small {{feet}} for her age.

hair.def: the soft thin things that grow on your head
ex: She has long black {{hair}} and big eyes.

arm.def: the long part of your body between your hand and your body
ex: He carried the box in his {{arms}}.
Raise your {{arm}} if you know the answer.

leg.def: the long part of your body that you walk with
ex: My {{legs}} are tired after the long walk.

mother.def: a woman who has a child
ex: 우리 엄마는 우리에게 저녁을 만들어 줘요.

father.def: a man who has a child
ex: His {{father}} reads him a story at night.
그의 아버지는 밤에 그에게 이야기를 읽어 줘요.

baby.def: a very young child that can not walk or talk
ex: The {{baby}} is sleeping in her bed.
A {{baby}} cries when it is hungry.

sister.def: a girl who has the same mother and father as you
ex: My {{sister}} is two years older than me.
우리 언니는 나보다 두 살 많아요.
I play with my little {{sister}} every day.

brother.def: a boy who has the same mother and father as you
ex: My big {{brother}} helps me with homework.
He has two {{brothers}} and one sister.
그는 남자 형제가 둘, 여자 형제가 하나 있어요.
The {{boy}} is playing with his dog.
Two {{boys}} are running in the park.
A {{girl}} in my class sits next to me.
우리 반 여자아이가 내 옆에 앉아요.

teacher.def: a person who helps children learn
ex: Our {{teacher}} is very kind to us.
The {{teacher}} wrote the words on the board.

doctor.def: a person who helps sick people get well
ex: The {{doctor}} helped me when I was sick.
내가 아팠을 때 의사 선생님이 도와줬어요.
My aunt is a {{doctor}} at a big hospital.

name.def: the word that people use to call you
ex: My {{name}} is on my school bag.
Please write your {{name}} at the top.
My {{house}} is close to the school.

room.def: one part inside a house with its own walls

bed.def: the thing that you sleep on at night
ex: I go to {{bed}} at nine every night.
나는 매일 밤 아홉 시에 자러 가요.
The cat is sleeping on my {{bed}}.

table.def: a thing with a flat top and legs that you put things on
ex: Please put the books on the {{table}}.

chair.def: a thing with a back and four legs that one person sits on
ex: There are four {{chairs}} around the table.
식탁 둘레에 의자 네 개가 있어요.

clock.def: a thing on the wall that shows you the time
ex: The {{clock}} says it is three now.
시계가 지금 세 시라고 알려 줘요.
There is a big {{clock}} in our classroom.

key.def: a small metal thing that you use to open a door
ex: I lost the {{key}} to my house.
She keeps her {{keys}} in her bag.

box.def: a container with flat sides for keeping things
ex: I put my toys in a big {{box}}.
There are ten {{boxes}} in the room.

cup.def: a small round container that you drink from
ex: I drink tea from a red {{cup}}.

bag.def: a thing that you carry books or food in
ex: My school {{bag}} is very heavy today.
She put an apple in her {{bag}}.

eat.def: to put food in your mouth and make it go down
ex: 우리는 매일 밤 함께 저녁을 먹어요.

drink.def: to take water or milk into your mouth and make it go down
ex: I {{drink}} water when I am thirsty.
He {{drank}} a glass of cold milk.
그는 차가운 우유 한 잔을 마셨어요.

sleep.def: to close your eyes and rest your body at night
ex: I {{sleep}} for eight hours every night.
나는 매일 밤 여덟 시간 자요.
The baby {{slept}} for the whole afternoon.

walk.def: to move on your feet from one place to another

jump.def: to push yourself up into the air with your legs
ex: 우리 개는 아주 높이 뛸 수 있어요.

sing.def: to make music with your voice
ex: We {{sing}} a happy song in class.
우리는 수업 시간에 즐거운 노래를 불러요.

read.def: to look at words and understand what they mean
ex: I like to {{read}} books about animals.
나는 동물에 관한 책 읽는 걸 좋아해요.
She {{read}} the story to her little brother.

write.def: to make words on paper with a pen
ex: Please {{write}} your name on the paper.
He {{wrote}} a letter to his friend.

run.def: to move very quickly on your feet
ex: I can {{run}} faster than my brother.
나는 우리 형보다 빨리 달릴 수 있어요.

sit.def: to rest on the lower part of your body
ex: The cat {{sat}} on the warm chair.

look.def: to turn your eyes to see something
ex: She {{looked}} up at the night sky.

help.def: to do something good for someone who needs it
ex: I always {{help}} my mother at home.
Can you {{help}} me with this box?
이 상자 옮기는 것 좀 도와줄래요?

open.def: to move something so that it is not closed
ex: She {{opened}} the box and looked inside.

close.def: to move something so that it is not open
ex: Please {{close}} the window, it is cold.
He {{closed}} his book and went to sleep.

give.def: to put something in someone's hand to keep
ex: Please {{give}} this letter to your teacher.
She {{gave}} me a nice birthday present.
그녀는 나에게 멋진 생일 선물을 줬어요.
An elephant is a very {{big}} animal.
She lives in a {{small}} house near us.
그녀는 우리 근처 작은 집에 살아요.

long.def: far from one end to the other end
ex: We walked a {{long}} way to the river.
He is {{short}}, so he sits at the front.

hot.def: very warm, like fire or the summer sun
ex: The soup is too {{hot}} to eat now.
국이 너무 뜨거워서 지금 못 먹어요.

new.def: made a short time ago, not old
ex: I got a {{new}} bike for my birthday.
She is wearing a {{new}} dress today.

old.def: made a long time ago, or having lived many years
ex: This is a very {{old}} book from my grandfather.
이건 우리 할아버지의 아주 오래된 책이에요.
우리 할머니는 이제 꽤 나이가 드셨어요.
A turtle is a very {{slow}} animal.
The bus was {{slow}} because of the rain.

happy.def: feeling good because something nice happened
ex: I am so {{happy}} to see you!
She looked {{happy}} with her new bike.
그녀는 새 자전거를 받고 기뻐 보였어요.

sad.def: feeling bad because something is not nice
ex: He was {{sad}} when his dog was sick.
My hands are {{clean}} now after washing.
Please keep your room {{clean}} and nice.
My shoes are {{dirty}} after the rain.
비가 온 뒤 내 신발이 더러워요.
Do not touch the food with {{dirty}} hands.

red.def: having the colour of blood or a tomato

blue.def: having the colour of the sky on a clear day

green.def: having the colour of grass and leaves

yellow.def: having the colour of the sun or a banana

white.def: having the colour of snow or milk
ex: The falling snow is soft and {{white}}.
She wore a {{white}} dress to school.
그녀는 하얀 원피스를 입고 학교에 갔어요.

black.def: having the colour of the night sky with no light
ex: A tiger has {{black}} lines on its body.
He has short {{black}} hair and brown eyes.

senses.def: to do something fun with toys or with friends
ex: The children are {{playing}} in the park.
Do you want to {{play}} with me today?

senses.def: to take part in a game or a sport
ex: Let's {{play}} soccer with my friends after school.

senses.note: 악기 이름 앞에는 the를 써요: play the piano
senses.def: to make music with a piano, a drum, or a guitar
ex: He can {{play}} the piano very well.

cake.def: a soft sweet food that people eat at a party
ex: We ate {{cake}} at her birthday party.
우리는 그녀의 생일 파티에서 케이크를 먹었어요.

rice.def: the small white seeds that many people eat every day
ex: We eat {{rice}} with almost every meal.
우리는 거의 매 끼니 밥을 먹어요.
She cooked warm {{rice}} for our dinner.

banana.def: a long yellow fruit with soft white food inside
ex: My sister eats a {{banana}} every morning.
우리 언니는 매일 아침 바나나를 하나 먹어요.

orange.def: a round sweet fruit with a thick skin

car.def: a thing with four wheels that people ride in on roads
ex: We go to the sea by {{car}}.

bike.def: a thing with two wheels that you ride and move with your legs
ex: I ride my {{bike}} to the park.
He got a new {{bike}} for his birthday.

bus.def: a very big thing that carries many people on roads
ex: The {{bus}} stops in front of my house.

train.def: a long line of cars that moves on metal lines
ex: We took a {{train}} to the mountain.
The {{train}} is very fast and long.

boat.def: a thing that carries people on water
ex: We rode a small {{boat}} on the lake.
The {{boat}} moved slowly across the river.

day.def: the time when there is light from the sun
ex: It was a warm and sunny {{day}}.

night.def: the dark time when the sun is not in the sky

morning.def: the early part of the day after you wake up

ex: My little sister is nine {{years}} old.

hat.def: a thing that you wear on your head
ex: I wear a {{hat}} on sunny days.

shoe.def: a thing that you wear on your foot
ex: My new {{shoes}} are white and clean.

dress.def: a piece of clothes that a girl wears over her body
ex: She wore a blue {{dress}} to the party.
그녀는 파티에 파란 원피스를 입고 갔어요.
This {{dress}} is too long for me.

coat.def: warm clothes that you wear over other clothes when it is cold
ex: Wear your {{coat}}, it is cold outside.
He hung his {{coat}} by the door.

pen.def: a thin thing that you use to write with
ex: I write my name with a black {{pen}}.

pencil.def: a thin thing made of wood that you use to write or draw
ex: She draws a picture with a {{pencil}}.

paper.def: the thin flat thing that you write or draw on
ex: Please write your name on the {{paper}}.
She drew a cat on white {{paper}}.

picture.def: a drawing or an image of someone or something
ex: I drew a {{picture}} of my family.
There are many {{pictures}} in this book.

game.def: a fun thing that you play with rules
ex: We played a fun {{game}} at the party.

toy.def: a thing that children play with
ex: The baby is playing with a soft {{toy}}.
Please put your {{toys}} in the box.

park.def: a large open place with grass and trees where people play
ex: We play in the {{park}} after school.
There are many trees in this {{park}}.

shop.def: a place where you buy things with money
ex: My mother went to the {{shop}} to buy milk.
우리 엄마는 우유를 사러 가게에 갔어요.
There is a small {{shop}} near my house.
우리 집 근처에 작은 가게가 있어요.

hospital.def: a place where doctors help sick people get well
ex: The doctor works at a big {{hospital}}.
We went to the {{hospital}} to see my aunt.

fox.def: a small wild animal with red hair and a long tail
ex: A {{fox}} ran quickly into the forest.
The {{fox}} has a long soft tail.

bee.def: a small insect that flies from flower to flower
ex: A {{bee}} is sitting on the yellow flower.
벌 한 마리가 노란 꽃에 앉아 있어요.
The {{bees}} fly around the garden all day.

chicken.def: a farm bird that gives us eggs to eat
ex: 닭이 오늘 달걀 세 개를 낳았어요.
We keep some {{chickens}} on our farm.
우리는 농장에서 닭을 몇 마리 길러요.

elephant.def: a very big grey animal with a long nose and two long white teeth
elephant.note: 코끼리의 긴 코는 영어로 trunk라고 불러요.
ex: An {{elephant}} drinks water with its long nose.
We saw three {{elephants}} at the zoo.
우리는 동물원에서 코끼리 세 마리를 봤어요.

carrot.def: a long orange vegetable that grows under the ground
ex: A rabbit likes to eat a {{carrot}}.
My mother put {{carrots}} in the soup.

cheese.def: a soft yellow food that is made from milk
ex: 나는 빵에 치즈 얹어 먹는 걸 좋아해요.

chocolate.def: a sweet brown food that many children love
ex: She gave me a piece of {{chocolate}}.
그녀가 나에게 초콜릿 한 조각을 줬어요.

cookie.def: a small sweet cake that is hard and round
ex: 나는 저녁 먹고 쿠키 두 개를 먹었어요.

grape.def: a small sweet round fruit that grows on a plant
ex: She washed the {{grapes}} before eating them.

juice.def: the sweet water that comes out of a fruit
ex: 나는 매일 아침 오렌지 주스를 마셔요.
May I have a glass of apple {{juice}}?

meat.def: the food that comes from the body of an animal
ex: We eat {{meat}} and vegetables for dinner.
This {{meat}} is too hard to eat.
이 고기는 너무 질겨서 못 먹겠어요.

potato.def: a round vegetable that grows under the ground

tomato.def: a soft round red fruit that people put in salad
ex: I put a {{tomato}} in my sandwich.
These red {{tomatoes}} grow in our garden.
이 빨간 토마토는 우리 정원에서 자라요.

candy.def: a very sweet food that children like to eat
ex: She gave each child a small {{candy}}.
그녀는 아이들에게 작은 사탕을 하나씩 줬어요.

finger.def: one of the five long parts at the end of your hand
ex: I hurt my {{finger}} on the door.
A baby holds things with its {{fingers}}.

tooth.def: one of the hard white parts in your mouth that you eat with

beach.def: the land with sand next to the sea
ex: We played on the {{beach}} all day.
There is soft white sand on this {{beach}}.
이 해변에는 부드러운 하얀 모래가 있어요.

farm.def: a place where people grow food and keep animals
ex: My uncle lives on a big {{farm}}.
There are cows and pigs on the {{farm}}.

forest.def: a large place with very many trees

garden.def: a place next to a house where flowers and vegetables grow
ex: My grandmother grows flowers in her {{garden}}.
We eat vegetables from our own {{garden}}.
우리는 우리 정원에서 난 채소를 먹어요.

grass.def: the thin green plants that cover the ground
ex: The children sat on the green {{grass}}.
A cow eats {{grass}} in the field.

lake.def: a large area of water with land all around it
ex: We rode a boat on the {{lake}}.

hill.def: a high place on the land, smaller than a mountain
ex: Their house is on top of a {{hill}}.

bottle.def: a tall glass or plastic thing that holds water or milk
ex: Please give me that {{bottle}} of water.
The baby drinks milk from a {{bottle}}.

spoon.def: a thing that you use to eat soup
ex: Please put a {{spoon}} next to each plate.

fork.def: a thing with sharp points that you use to eat
ex: She eats her noodles with a {{fork}}.

knife.def: a sharp thing that you use to cut food
ex: He cut the bread with a {{knife}}.

desk.def: a table where you read and write at school
ex: Please keep the top of your {{desk}} clean.

floor.def: the part of a room that you walk on
ex: Please do not drop food on the {{floor}}.

wall.def: the side part of a room or a house
ex: There is a big picture on the {{wall}}.
The clock on the {{wall}} is very old.

umbrella.def: a thing that you hold over your head in the rain
ex: Her {{umbrella}} is blue with white stars.
그녀의 우산은 파란 바탕에 하얀 별이 있어요.

aunt.def: the sister of your mother or your father
ex: My {{aunt}} gave me a nice present.
우리 이모가 나에게 멋진 선물을 줬어요.

uncle.def: the brother of your mother or your father
ex: My {{uncle}} taught me how to swim.
우리 삼촌이 나에게 수영을 가르쳐 줬어요.

grandfather.def: the father of your mother or your father

king.def: a man who rules a country
ex: The {{king}} lived in a big castle.
A lion is called the {{king}} of animals.

queen.def: a woman who rules a country

nurse.def: a person who helps a doctor take care of sick people
ex: The {{nurse}} was very kind to me.
My sister wants to be a {{nurse}}.
우리 언니는 간호사가 되고 싶어 해요.

make.def: to build something new with your hands
ex: She {{made}} a birthday card for her friend.
그녀는 친구를 위해 생일 카드를 만들었어요.

take.def: to hold something and carry it with you
ex: Please {{take}} this book to your teacher.
He {{took}} an apple from the box.

come.def: to move toward the person who is speaking
ex: Please {{come}} here and sit next to me.
My friends {{came}} to my birthday party.

go.def: to move from one place to another place
ex: They {{went}} to the sea last summer.

buy.def: to get something by giving money for it
ex: I want to {{buy}} a new toy.
She {{bought}} some bread at the shop.

cook.def: to make food hot so that you can eat it
ex: She {{cooked}} rice and soup for us.
그녀는 우리에게 밥과 국을 해 줬어요.

draw.def: to make a picture with a pen or pencil
ex: I like to {{draw}} animals and flowers.
나는 동물과 꽃 그리는 걸 좋아해요.
He {{drew}} a picture of his family.

wash.def: to make something clean with water
ex: 우리 엄마가 내 더러운 옷을 빨아 줬어요.

swim.def: to move in the water with your arms and legs

climb.def: to go up a tree or a mountain
ex: A monkey can {{climb}} a tree fast.
원숭이는 나무를 빨리 오를 수 있어요.

tall.def: not short, going up very high
ex: My father is very {{tall}} and strong.
The room was very {{dark}} at night.
I am a little afraid of {{dark}} places.

heavy.def: not light, and hard to carry
ex: This box is too {{heavy}} for me.
She carried a {{heavy}} bag to school.
그녀는 무거운 가방을 메고 학교에 갔어요.
My clothes are {{wet}} from the rain.

warm.def: a little hot, in a nice way
ex: I wear a {{warm}} coat in winter.

strong.def: having much power in your body
ex: A bear is a very {{strong}} animal.
He is {{strong}} enough to lift the box.
그는 상자를 들 만큼 힘이 세요.
We have music class twice a {{week}}.
우리는 일주일에 두 번 음악 수업이 있어요.
I will see my friend next {{week}}.
나는 다음 주에 친구를 만날 거예요.

month.def: one of the twelve parts of a year
ex: One year has twelve {{months}} in it.

winter.def: the cold time of the year with snow

shirt.def: clothes that you wear on the top part of your body
ex: He is wearing a white {{shirt}} today.
그는 오늘 하얀 셔츠를 입고 있어요.
My {{shirt}} got dirty during the game.

sock.def: clothes that you wear on your foot inside a shoe
ex: I put on clean {{socks}} every day.
One of my {{socks}} is lost again.
내 양말 한 짝이 또 없어졌어요.

jacket.def: a short coat that you wear when it is cold
ex: Put on your {{jacket}}, it is cold outside.
그녀는 따뜻한 파란 재킷을 가지고 있어요.

class.def: a group of children who learn together at school
ex: There are twenty children in my {{class}}.
우리 반에는 아이들이 스무 명 있어요.
We have a music {{class}} after lunch.
우리는 점심 후에 음악 수업이 있어요.

map.def: a picture that shows where places are
ex: We looked at a {{map}} of the city.
There is a big {{map}} on the wall.

letter.def: words that you write and send to someone
ex: I wrote a {{letter}} to my grandfather.
She got a {{letter}} from her friend.

music.def: the nice sound that you make when you sing or play
ex: She plays happy {{music}} on the piano.

soccer.def: a game where you kick a ball with your foot
ex: We play {{soccer}} in the park after school.
우리는 방과 후에 공원에서 축구를 해요.

piano.def: a big music thing that you play with your fingers
ex: There is an old {{piano}} in our house.

doll.def: a toy that looks like a small person or baby
ex: She has many {{dolls}} in her room.
